author: 0xrubo
content: <@774033563732541451> hey. i'm having problems deserializing `statelessInputBytes` accroding to [`SszStatelessInput`](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/projects/zkevm/src/ethereum/forks/amsterdam/stateless_ssz.py#L114-L120) -- all inputs from jsons are 8-bytes longer than expected for the [`SszExecutionPayload`](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/projects/zkevm/src/ethereum/forks/amsterdam/stateless_ssz.py#L64-L86). if i add an extra `uint64` field after `block_access_list`, then it decodes correctly. what am i missing?

author: jsign
content:
I think you might have been based on looking at `projects/zkevm`? That's the "base branch". The releases are done in `projects/zkevm-bal-devnet-3` branch, which is  based in BAL Devnet 3 network.
In that case, the [ExecutionPayload has the `slot_number` field after `block_access_list`](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/d2845e8c4bf2179e87645446e378c580bef79dc9/src/ethereum/forks/amsterdam/execution_engine/types.py#L59) which I think explains what you're observing?

author: 0xrubo
content: oh, right. so is that the branch to check against?

author: jsign
content: Yep, it is the branch that we use to make releases. Mostly to help ELs run the tests in the same branch they're working with daily (i.e. active devnet)

author: 0xrubo
content: thanks. that fixed things on my end.
